session_context: May 15 session: SPX moderate vs bands; 10Y elevated Z; WTI rising. State pressure stable.

drafts.x:

Needs oil to break the range — only then does it matter.

SPX 7,415. 10Y 4.56%. Oil $99.

• 10Y moves beyond 4.76% or below 4.36%

Snapshot — May 15, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,414.65   z +1.74
  10Y Yield:      4.562%  z +2.13
  WTI Oil:        99.32   z +0.62

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,415 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.56% is running well beyond its 63-session range — yields haven't been this stretched in months. Oil at $99 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,526 or below 7,303
• 10Y moves beyond 4.76% or below 4.36%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
